name: costar-saved-search
use_for: Run a CoStar saved search, screen the grid (FAR/PLSF/PSFB via gateway), and persist deduped properties + broker contacts.

name: reonomy-saved-search
use_for: Run a Reonomy saved search and persist deduped off-market properties + owner contact shells (flow2).

name: lexisnexis-contact-lookup
use_for: Pull pending contacts from the gateway, look up phones/emails via LexisNexis SmartLinx, and write the results back.
